Document:
# Consent setting up consent and readings others consent
## How To Setup Up Near the top of the screen is a button to change your consent info. You have two tabs to edit Character specific which is tied to your current character or account specific which shows up for all characters. The third tabs shows a preview of what it might look like
Can do cool tricks such as
extlink="Display Text" link="https://example.com/" inside brackets square brackets to make a link on your consent page. you also can do other color formats and text formats that normal SS14 paperwork has. Character specific can be used for both consent and some details of NSFW your character may interact with.
## Consent Toggles
on the account specific below the text box you can turn on or off consents for certain mechanics.
## How To View Others Consent. shift click or right click examine and select character option. symbol of head with gears.
## Subtle Do note others OOC consent. and try be respectful of other wayfarers in doubt please LOOC or SubtleLOOC the person. Always use LOOC as a safeword when needed if someone ask for you to stop please do so. If issues arise don't be afraid to Ahelp it.
Do try and subtle any hardcore kink out of general public. remember ghost can see emotes and whispers but cannot see subtle.
